overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character in dark robes exploring the interior of a rustic stone cottage with wooden beams, thatched roofing, and medieval furnishings. The character walks through the cozy residential space examining the bedroom, dining area, and living room before approaching a wooden exit door.

events.description: character moves from bedroom area into view of the dining table and fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the cottage interior, observing the wooden loft structure above

entered.detail: tall wooden bookshelf filled with books against the stone wall
wooden bed frame with light green curtains hanging around it
sloped ceiling with wooden beams and thatched roofing material
lit lantern hanging from the ceiling on a chain
window with light green curtains letting in natural daylight
wooden dining table with white tablecloth and chairs
stone fireplace with visible fire burning inside

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a cozy stone bedroom with a wooden bookshelf and curtained bed visible to the right. The camera follows as they walk forward, revealing a thatched ceiling with wooden beams and a hanging lantern. As they progress, a dining table and stone fireplace come into view in the distance, marking the transition toward the main living area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dining and living area with fireplace

events.description: character turns left toward the sofa area, shifting focus from fireplace to living space

agents.ego_description: walking past the dining table and fireplace, turning to examine the sofa and cabinet area

entered.detail: brown leather armchair positioned near the fireplace
tall wooden cabinet with arched top and mirror
brown leather sofa with tufted backrest

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the dining area where the stone fireplace provides warm lighting. They turn left toward a leather sofa and wooden cabinet, passing a leather armchair. The hanging lantern shifts to the left side of the frame as the character reorients toward the living area, with the dining table and fireplace now visible to the right.

events.description: character approaches the wooden exit door at the far end of the room

agents.ego_description: walking toward the wooden door at the end of the room, passing wall sconces and a kitchen counter

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal hinges at the end of the room
lit wall-mounted torches flanking the door
wooden counter with dishes and kitchen items
wooden barrel next to the counter

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the living area toward a wooden exit door, passing a leather sofa that shifts to the right side of the frame. Wall sconces provide warm lighting near the door, while a wooden counter with dishes and a barrel appear on the right. The fireplace and dining table are left behind as the character approaches the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic stone cottage, transitioning from a private bedroom into a warm, open living space. It begins in a cozy bedroom beside a curtained bed and wooden bookshelf, moving forward under a thatched ceiling with wooden beams and a hanging lantern. As the character progresses, the scene opens into a dining area where the lighting shifts to the warm glow of a stone fireplace, before the camera turns left to pass a leather armchair and wooden cabinet. The movement then flows into the main living area, gliding past a leather sofa and a wooden counter with dishes and a barrel. Finally, the fireplace and dining table recede into the background as the camera approaches a wooden exit door illuminated by wall sconces.
